mapper.sql: select id, picture, video, remark, warning_time, handle_time, create_time, instruction, type, name, ip, scene, status, handle, section from yn_user
mapper.insert: insert into yn_user(picture, video, remark, warning_time, handle_time, instruction, type, name, ip, scene, status, handle, section) values(#{picture}, #{video}, #{remark}, #{warningTime}, #{handleTime}, #{instruction}, #{type}, #{name}, #{ip}, #{scene}, #{status}, #{handle}, #{section})
mapper.update: update yn_user set picture=#{picture}, video=#{video}, remark=#{remark}, warning_time=#{warningTime}, handle_time=#{handleTime}, instruction=#{instruction}, type=#{type}, name=#{name}, ip=#{ip}, scene=#{scene}, status=#{status}, handle=#{handle}, section=#{section} where id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from yn_user where id in #{id}
